name: Virgil Galan
role_title: Technical Director | Digital Transformation | Cloud & Agile Delivery
profile: Virgil Galan is a technical director with over 15 years of experience in software engineering and programme delivery. Led large-scale digital transformation initiatives across financial services, hospitality, and retail sectors. Expertise spans cloud architecture, agile at scale, and cross-functional team leadership.
education: MSc Computer Science – Polytechnic University of Bucharest, 2005

employer_bullets: Led a 60-person delivery organisation across Romania, India, and the US.

bullets: Architected microservices migration from monolithic legacy system.
Reduced deployment lead time by 60% via CI/CD pipeline automation.
Delivered MVP on schedule within 9 months.
Led technical discovery and solution design for a £12M replatforming programme.
Onboarded and mentored a 25-person engineering team.

employer_bullets: Directed delivery of core banking modernisation programmes across 3 European markets.
Introduced SAFe methodology reducing time-to-market by 35%.

bullets: Delivered phased migration of 4 legacy banking systems to cloud-native architecture.
Coordinated work across 8 vendor teams and 120 stakeholders.
